resources.string: Failed to get HP Workpath SDK permissions. Call JetAdvantageLink.requestPermissions() to obtain permissions.
Do you want to give %s (%s) application full access to HP Workpath SDK?

The application will be able to use the Scan, Print, Copy and Fax capabilities of any connected printer using HP JetAdvantage Link SDK. In order to revoke all accepted permissions, please go to App Management and clear all data for the HP Workpath SDK.
HP Workpath SDK needs to use your device\'s SD card in order to save scanned files. Please grant permissions in the following system dialogs.
The app was not allowed to write to your storage. Therefore, it may not work properly. Please consider granting it this permission.
